title: CLI Adapter Layer — Versioned Registry + NDJSON Parsing
description: Create the CLIAdapter module that detects the maestro CLI version at startup and parses CLI command outputs (skills list, delegate events) into typed domain objects. Uses the Versioned Registry pattern: run `maestro --version`, match major version to a registered adapter, fail-fast if unsupported.
action: Create src/lib/server/cli-adapter.ts with CLIAdapterRegistry class and CLIAdapter interface. Implement detectVersion() that spawns `maestro --version`, parseSkillsOutput(raw: string): WorkflowMeta[] that parses NDJSON from `maestro ralph skills --json --quiet`, and parseDelegateOutput(raw: string): DelegateEvent[] that parses delegate broker events. Throw UnsupportedVersionError when version not in registry. Add WorkflowMeta and DelegateEvent types to src/lib/shared/types.ts.

criteria: src/lib/server/cli-adapter.ts contains 'export interface CLIAdapter' with parseSkillsOutput and parseDelegateOutput methods
src/lib/server/cli-adapter.ts contains 'export class UnsupportedVersionError extends Error'
CLIAdapterRegistry.detectVersion() calls child_process.exec('maestro --version') and returns parsed semver string via Promise
CLIAdapterRegistry.getAdapter(version) returns matching adapter or throws UnsupportedVersionError
parseSkillsOutput correctly parses NDJSON lines into WorkflowMeta[] array
parseDelegateOutput correctly parses broker events {type:'queued'|'started'|'completed'|'failed'} into DelegateEvent[]
convergence.definition_of_done: CLI Adapter can detect maestro version, select matching adapter from registry, and parse both skills list NDJSON and delegate broker event streams into typed objects

files.change: Add WorkflowMeta interface {id, name, category, description, params: ParamDef[]} and DelegateEvent interface {type:'queued'|'started'|'completed'|'failed', executionId, stepIndex?, stepName?, output?, error?}

Create CLIAdapter interface with parseSkillsOutput(raw:string):WorkflowMeta[] and parseDelegateOutput(raw:string):DelegateEvent[]. Create CLIAdapterRegistry with detectVersion():Promise<string>, getAdapter(version:string):CLIAdapter, registerAdapter(majorVersion:number, adapter:CLIAdapter). Create UnsupportedVersionError class.
Test detectVersion parsing, registry lookup, UnsupportedVersionError on unknown version, parseSkillsOutput with sample NDJSON, parseDelegateOutput with broker event lines

implementation: Add WorkflowMeta and DelegateEvent interfaces to src/lib/shared/types.ts. WorkflowMeta: {id:string, name:string, category:string, description:string, params:ParamDef[]} where ParamDef={name:string, type:string, required:boolean, default?:unknown}. DelegateEvent: {type:'queued'|'started'|'completed'|'failed', executionId:string, stepIndex?:number, stepName?:string, output?:string, error?:string, timestamp?:string}

Create src/lib/server/cli-adapter.ts. Import child_process, types from shared/types. Define CLIAdapter interface with parseSkillsOutput(raw:string):WorkflowMeta[] and parseDelegateOutput(raw:string):DelegateEvent[].

Implement CLIAdapterRegistry class with private adapters Map<number, CLIAdapter>. Method registerAdapter(majorVersion:number, adapter:CLIAdapter):void. Method detectVersion():Promise<string> that runs `maestro --version` via child_process.exec, parses semver (e.g. '1.2.3' -> major=1), returns full version string. Method getAdapter(version:string):CLIAdapter that extracts major version and looks up in registry, throws UnsupportedVersionError if not found.

Implement UnsupportedVersionError extends Error with constructor(detectedVersion:string, supportedVersions:number[]) that sets message to `Unsupported maestro version ${detectedVersion}. Supported major versions: ${supportedVersions.join(', ')}`

Implement DefaultCLIAdapter (implements CLIAdapter) with parseSkillsOutput: split input by newlines, filter empty, JSON.parse each line, map to WorkflowMeta. parseDelegateOutput: same line-split approach, map each parsed object to DelegateEvent with type validation.

Create src/lib/server/__tests__/cli-adapter.test.ts following vitest pattern from event-bus.test.ts. Mock child_process.exec for detectVersion tests. Test: (1) detectVersion parses 'maestro 1.5.0' -> '1.5.0', (2) getAdapter('1.5.0') returns registered adapter, (3) getAdapter('99.0.0') throws UnsupportedVersionError, (4) parseSkillsOutput with 3-line NDJSON returns 3 WorkflowMeta items, (5) parseDelegateOutput with broker events returns typed DelegateEvent array, (6) parseSkillsOutput with empty string returns empty array, (7) parseDelegateOutput with malformed line skips it gracefully

reference.pattern: EventBus constructor injection + singleton export pattern from event-bus.ts

rationale.chosen_approach: Versioned Registry pattern allows adding new CLI version adapters without modifying existing code. Each major version gets its own adapter implementation. Fail-fast on version mismatch prevents silent parsing errors.
decision_factors: User decision locked on Versioned Registry
CLI output format may change between major versions
Need clear error when maestro version is incompatible
rationale.tradeoffs: Registry must be manually updated when new major versions release, but this is intentional — each version needs tested adapter logic

risks.risk: maestro CLI not installed on dev machine
risks.mitigation: Tests mock child_process.exec; detectVersion is only called at server startup, not in tests
